import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import ta
def generate_signals(df, params):
    window = params['window']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    df['ma'] = df['close'].rolling(window=window).mean()
    df['deviation'] = (df['close'] - df['ma']) / df['ma']
    signals = np.where(df['deviation'] > threshold, -1, np.where(df['deviation'] < -threshold, 1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: USD/JPY exhibits mean reversion tendencies where deviations from the moving average tend to revert back to the mean.
